title: Configure Replit environment (.replit, replit.nix, env vars)
description: Set up the Replit run configuration, Nix environment with Node.js 20, and document all required environment variables in .env.example. Ensure `npm run dev` starts the Next.js dev server correctly.

acceptance_criteria.text: .replit file configures run command to `npm run dev`
replit.nix pins Node.js 20 and required system packages
.env.example documents all required env vars with descriptions
App starts successfully on Replit with no errors

steps: Create `.replit` with `run = "npm run dev"` and correct entrypoint
Create `.env.example` listing all 5 env vars with placeholder values and comments
Verify dev server boots on Replit
risks: Nix package names may differ — verify nodejs_20 package name in nixpkgs
